description_long: This is a small, round stone kiosk with a prominent domed roof, reminiscent of neoclassical or Renaissance architectural influences. The exterior is constructed from light-colored stone blocks, with vertical pilasters evenly spaced around the circumference, giving it a stately appearance. The front features a single recessed doorway accessed by a short, wide staircase, while the rear and sides have large, rectangular multi-pane windows set into the stonework. The dome is ribbed and topped with a decorative finial, and a dark horizontal band encircles the structure just below the roofline. The base of the kiosk is slightly wider and constructed from a different, rougher stone, providing visual contrast and stability. There is no visible signage or ornamentation beyond the architectural detailing.
description: A round stone kiosk with a ribbed domed roof, pilasters, a single front door, and large rectangular windows on the sides and rear.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with a recessed doorway and a wide staircase leading up to it.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting a large rectangular window and the continuation of the staircase wrapping around the side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a large rectangular window centered on the back wall, with no visible entrance.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with another large window and the staircase visible curving around the structure.
attribute_window_presence: Three large rectangular windows, located on the rear and both sides.
attribute_door_configuration: One single door, recessed, located at the front.
attribute_roof_design: Domed roof with ribbed detailing, made of stone or metal, topped with a decorative finial.
attribute_architectural_style: Neoclassical with Renaissance influences, featuring pilasters and a domed roof.
